title: REDUCING THE CYBERSECURITY RISKS OF PORTABLE STORAGE MEDIA IN OT ENVIRONMENTS
description: Though portable storage media are convenient, their unregulated use poses cybersecurity risks for organizations utilizing them in their OT environments.
text:
Powell, M. , Philip, F. and Saravia, S. (2025), REDUCING THE CYBERSECURITY RISKS OF PORTABLE STORAGE MEDIA IN OT ENVIRONMENTS, Special Publication (NIST SP), National Institute of Standards and Technology, Gaithersburg, MD, [online], https://doi.org/10.6028/NIST.SP.1334, https://tsapps.nist.gov/publication/get_pdf.cfm?pub_id=960694 (Accessed March 1, 2026)
